title: Amazon pays $11.5B to satisfy satellite-envy while cowering in Musk's shadow
snippet: Deal only comes with 24 operational sats, but also an Apple deal, spectrum licenses, and plenty of IP Amazon has agreed to pay more than $11.5 billion to expand its satellite constellation by about two dozen units with…
contentText: Deal only comes with 24 operational sats, but also an Apple deal, spectrum licenses, and plenty of IP Amazon has agreed to pay more than $11.5 billion to expand its satellite constellation by about two dozen units with the acquisition of Globalstar. But it's more about the underlying technology that Amazon hopes will help it catch Elon Musk's Starlink. …

title: Amazon to Buy Satellite Operator Globalstar for $11.6 Billion
snippet: Amazon has agreed to buy satellite operator Globalstar in a deal worth roughly $11.6 billion, marking its largest acquisition since the 2017 purchase of Whole Foods. The deal could help Amazon compete more closely with…
contentText: Amazon has agreed to buy satellite operator Globalstar in a deal worth roughly $11.6 billion, marking its largest acquisition since the 2017 purchase of Whole Foods. The deal could help Amazon compete more closely with its fast-growing rival Starlink. Bloomberg's Michelle Davis reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: IMF Urges Nations to Stay at Frontier of Mounting AI Risks
snippet: Governments and regulators must “stay at the frontier” of rising threats from artificial intelligence, a top official at the International Monetary Fund warned on Tuesday, as fears about the destructive potential of Ant…
contentText: Governments and regulators must “stay at the frontier” of rising threats from artificial intelligence, a top official at the International Monetary Fund warned on Tuesday, as fears about the destructive potential of Anthropic PBC’s new models dominated conversations at the fund’s Spring Meetings.

title: Intel's promising upcoming Nova Lake-S lineup reportedly includes an iGPU-focused SKU with 12 Xe3P cores — new leak claims a midrange 16-core CPU with powerful integrated graphics is in the works
snippet: A new leak claims Intel is prepping a 16-core CPU featuring 12 Xe3P iGPU cores, likely targeting the Ryzen G-series APUs. AMD's latest desktop APUs top out at only 8 RDNA 3.5 CUs, while the Arc B390M in Panther Lake alr…
contentText: A new leak claims Intel is prepping a 16-core CPU featuring 12 Xe3P iGPU cores, likely targeting the Ryzen G-series APUs. AMD's latest desktop APUs top out at only 8 RDNA 3.5 CUs, while the Arc B390M in Panther Lake already beats the Radeon 890M in Strix Point. That means 12 Xe3P cores on an NVL-S chip would be a heaven-sent for gamers.

title: Telesat’s Rebuild Gets Boost From Canada’s Defense War Chest
snippet: Prime Minister Mark Carney has opened the spigot for Canada to invest tens of billions of dollars more on defense, which means the country — very belatedly — just hit its North Atlantic Treaty Organization commitment to…
contentText: Prime Minister Mark Carney has opened the spigot for Canada to invest tens of billions of dollars more on defense, which means the country — very belatedly — just hit its North Atlantic Treaty Organization commitment to spend 2% of gross domestic product on security.

title: Altman-Backed Startup Raises $170 Million for Robocar Networks
snippet: Glydways Inc., the robocar startup backed by Sam Altman, is in talks to raise an additional $250 million on the heels of a roughly $170 million Series C round, underlining the high hopes and daunting hurdles of developi…
contentText: Glydways Inc., the robocar startup backed by Sam Altman, is in talks to raise an additional $250 million on the heels of a roughly $170 million Series C round, underlining the high hopes and daunting hurdles of developing closed-loop self-driving car systems.
